commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3283354c9283d834542aaca645bb9d6a39e21a36)
commands.review_summary:
The PR groups the Control UI sidebar's five most recent sessions into channel-labeled sections, adds channel/origin fields to the UI session row type, CSS, and a render regression test.

PR surface: Source +105, Tests +78. Total +183 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding from source: account-scoped keys such as agent:main:telegram:default:direct:42 are current test-covered shapes, but the PR regex only matches agent:<agent>:<channel>:(direct|group|channel). I did not run the PR test because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The contributor needs to fix the parser and provide real browser proof; automation should not take over an external PR that still lacks real behavior proof.

target.title: [codex] Group sidebar recent sessions by channel
target.body:
## Summary

- Group the sidebar's existing five most recent sessions by resolved channel.
- Resolve the channel from session row metadata first, then fall back to session key parsing for channel-backed sessions.
- Add sidebar group styling and regression coverage for the top-five-before-grouping behavior.

## Why

The sidebar recent list is used as a quick navigation surface. Grouping only the already-selected five most recent sessions keeps it compact while making recent conversations easier to scan by source, without trying to surface every channel.

## Validation

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --parallel-tests "node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts"`
- `git diff --check -- ui/src/ui/app-render.ts ui/src/ui/types.ts ui/src/styles/layout.css ui/src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: the sidebar recent list now groups the already-filtered top five sessions by channel.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout on macOS.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts`.
Evidence after fix: the regression test renders six sessions, verifies only the five newest appear, and verifies those five are grouped as Feishu, Dashboard, and Slack.
Observed result after fix: 1 test file passed, 14 tests passed.
What was not tested: a live browser screenshot against a running gateway was not captured for this cosmetic sidebar grouping change.
target.author: gimingrao
